description.value:
Even long dead lumber was once a tree. While maintaining this stance, you emit a Close range aura of difficult terrain as roots and vines sprout from the ground to impede your foes. This difficult terrain affects even flying foes as the plants reach up to grasp them. Whenever an enemy begins their turn within the aura or first enters it on their turn, they must make a Reflex save (DC 18 + your initiation modifier) or gain [sprout 6]; if they succeed on this save, they only gain [sprout 3]. Foes within the aura wearing plant-based armor or clothing gain 2 additional sprout from all sources.

Once per round, you may cause one of your successful attacks to inflict [sprout 3] on the target. If you are wielding a wooden or wooden-hafted weapon, this increases to [sprout 6].
